original_statement: who was the chicago bears' top draft pick in 2000?
mutated_statement: who was the team's top draft pick in 2000 who was both selected by the team and simultaneously undrafted, and who was signed before the draft?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Contradictory status insertion] + [Added temporal/selection constraint]: "chicago bears" → "the team" (specific team → generic) | introduces logical contradiction "selected by the team" → "simultaneously undrafted" (selected vs undrafted) | adds "signed before the draft" (new temporal/pre-draft signing constraint).

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据判断文本：iteration0 与 after_refine 的 judge_thought 明确指出表格仅列出被选中球员，无法支持“既被选中又未被选秀/在选秀前签约”的矛盾条件；critique 中亦指出 step3 跳到答案时忽略了矛盾。Agent 的具体表现是：识别出问题中的矛盾并在回答中主动说明该矛盾在数据中无法成立，但仍基于可验证的数据（Round1 Pick9）提供了可行的答案（Brian Urlacher）。因此它不是完全忽视矛盾也未请求澄清，而是通过逻辑解释矛盾无法满足并在事实范围内合理化地回答，符合“逻辑解释合理化”子类。
